message:
fix(obligation): strengthen ledger token validation and reset safety

Three improvements to ObligationLedger:

1. New record_for_token_mut() helper: centralizes the lookup-and-validate
   pattern for commit() and abort(). Beyond finding the record by ID, it
   now asserts that the token's kind, holder, and region all match the
   ledger record, catching misuse where a token from one obligation is
   applied to another.

2. reset() safety: now panics if any obligations are still pending,
   preventing silent loss of active obligation tracking. The generation
   counter (next_gen) is intentionally preserved across reset so
   post-reset acquisitions continue to get unique IDs.

3. New test: reset_panics_if_pending_obligation_exists verifies the
   guard, then confirms pending obligations remain trackable after the
   rejected reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
